items.headline: Ten-day ceasefire deal between Israel, Lebanon takes effect
items.summary: A ten-day ceasefire deal agreed between Lebanon and Israel took effect on Friday, as U.S. President Donald Trump said he was trying to set up the first-ever face-to-face meeting between the leaders of the two countries.

items.headline: Gold holds steady, eyes fourth weekly gain on US-Iran peace deal hopes
items.summary: Gold remains steady, aiming for a fourth weekly gain amid US-Iran peace deal hopes and Indian import restrictions.

items.summary: The pope’s genuflection to Islam spells disaster for Western civilization. Opinion.

items.headline: 100 bombs in 10 minutes: Mapping Lebanon's 'Black Wednesday'
items.summary: The Israeli Defense Forces labelled it Operation Eternal Darkness. Inside Lebanon, it's now called Black Wednesday. ABC NEWS Verify has geolocated the explosions across 10 minutes of chaos.

items.headline: Pakistan Oil Tanker Is First to Cross Hormuz since US Blockade
items.summary: A Pakistan-flagged tanker that entered the Persian Gulf over the weekend has become the first carrier to exit through the Strait of Hormuz with a crude cargo since a U.S. blockade began.

items.headline: GOP holds with Trump on Iran war, but cracks emerge as deadline nears
items.summary: Senate Republicans block a fourth war powers resolution on Trump's Iran war, but questions grow as the 60-day congressional deadline approaches.

items.headline: North Korea showing 'serious ability' over nuclear weapon
items.summary: North Korea is showing a "very serious increase" in its ability to produce nuclear weapons, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency has said.

items.headline: Trump squeezed between Israel and Turkey as Netanyahu, Erdogan escalate feud

items.headline: Meeting of 18-19 March 2026
items.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency.

items.headline: Stock Market Highlights: Sensex, Nifty settle marginally lower; Sensex closes down 122 points at 77,988, Nifty50 dips 34 points to 24,196
items.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Share Price Updates: Benchmarks settled marginally lower. Sensex declined 122.56 pts or 0.16% to 77,988.68, and Nifty 50 dipped 34.55 pts or 0.14% to 24,196.75.

items.summary: The S&P 500 hit a new all-time high Wednesday, a remarkable turnaround for stocks while the war with Iran drives up energy prices and cuts into global growth.
